trace:
--- Round 1 ---
<think>The user wants me to classify judgment documents into 5 categories based on their case types (案由). I'm currently processing DOC3 (《判决文书3》).

I need to:
1. Read the document content to understand what type of case this is
2. Determine which of the 5 categories it belongs to:
   - 劳动争议，人事争议 (Labor disputes, personnel disputes)
   - 危害公共安全罪 (Crimes endangering public safety)
   - 民事案由-合同，无因管理，不当得利纠纷 (Civil cases - contracts, negotiorum gestio, unjust enrichment)
   - 适用特殊程序案件案由 (Special procedure cases)
   - 用益物权纠纷 (Usufruct disputes)

Let me start by opening the first section to understand the nature of this case.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"1","expected_evidence":"Information about the case type, parties involved, and the nature of the dispute"}</search>
<info anchor_id="1">
刘远宝：
你因交通肇事一案，不服辽宁省凌海市人民法院（2022）辽0781刑初249号刑事附带民事判决及锦州市中级人民法院（2023）辽07刑终113号刑事附带民事裁定，以“原审法院认定申诉人构成交通肇事罪事实不清、证据不足，沈阳佳实司法鉴定所司法鉴定意见书未证明转向系统存在的故障，是在申诉人驾驶前就存在的，申诉人也无法检查肇事车辆的转向系统内部存在故障，且该故障也不属于应由申诉人检查的内容，本案交警部门作出的交通事故认定书认定的责任错误，不能直接作为定案依据，申诉人不应承担刑事责任”为主要理由，向本院提出申诉。

</info>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>From the first section, I can see this is a criminal case involving "交通肇事" (traffic accident causing casualties). The document mentions:
- "你因交通肇事一案" (You, due to a traffic accident case)
- "不服辽宁省凌海市人民法院（2022）辽0781刑初249号刑事附带民事判决" (dissatisfied with the criminal incidental civil judgment)
- "原审法院认定申诉人构成交通肇事罪" (the original court found the appellant constituted the crime of traffic accident)

"交通肇事罪" (crime of causing traffic accidents) is a crime that endangers public safety. This falls under "危害公共安全罪" (Crimes endangering public safety).

Let me check the other sections to confirm this classification and gather more evidence about the case type.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"2","expected_evidence":"Further confirmation of the case type and crime classification"}</search>
<info anchor_id="2">
本院经审查认为，原判认定你交通肇事犯罪事实的证据有案件来源、抓捕经过、驾驶人信息查询结果单、行驶证、认罪认罚具结书、证实事发时车辆行驶情况的车辆行驶光盘、辽NNxxxx车辆维修情况证明、锦州市公安司法鉴定中心法医学尸体检验鉴定书、死亡证明、现场勘验笔录、现场图、现场勘查照片、道路交通事故认定书、司法鉴定检验报告书、司法鉴定意见书及你的供述等。上述证据均系侦查机关依法定程序获取并经庭审质证，证据间能够相互印证，足以认定。你违反交通运输管理法规，致二人死亡，负事故的主要责任，已构成交通肇事罪。

</info>

--- Round 3 ---
<think>From section 2, I can confirm this is a criminal case involving "交通肇事罪" (crime of causing traffic accidents). The text states:
- "你违反交通运输管理法规，致二人死亡，负事故的主要责任，已构成交通肇事罪" (You violated traffic transportation management regulations, caused two deaths, bore main responsibility for the accident, and have constituted the crime of traffic accident)

"交通肇事罪" is indeed a crime that endangers public safety (危害公共安全罪). This is a well-established classification in Chinese criminal law.

Let me check the remaining sections to see if there's any additional information that might affect the classification, though I'm fairly confident this belongs to "危害公共安全罪".</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"3","expected_evidence":"Additional confirmation of the case type and any other relevant information"}</search>
<info anchor_id="3">
关于你所提的申诉理由，经查，交通管理部门根据交通事故现场勘验、检查、调查情况和有关的检验、鉴定结论，依照法定程序作出的对于交通事故的基本事实、成因及当事人责任划分的道路交通事故认定书，客观认定你承担此次事故的主要责任，原审法院经庭审质证认证，依法作为本案的定罪依据并无不当。根据《中华人民共和国道路交通安全法》的规定，驾驶人驾驶机动车上道路行驶前，应当对机动车的安全技术性能进行认真检查；不得驾驶安全设施不全或者机件不符合技术标准等具有安全隐患的机动车。沈阳佳实司法鉴定所司法鉴定意见书载明，肇事车辆转向系统转动不灵活且具有明显卡滞现象，该转向系统内部存在明显不足，存在故障。你继续驾驶该车行驶，违反法律规定，也未采取有效措施应对出现的故障，致使发生交通事故，负事故的主要责任，造成二人死亡的后果，你的行为符合交通肇事罪的构成特点。你的申诉理由与查明的事实和证据不符，本院不予支持。

</info>

--- Round 4 ---
<think>From section 3, I can further confirm this is a criminal case involving "交通肇事罪" (crime of causing traffic accidents). The text states:
- "你的行为符合交通肇事罪的构成特点" (Your behavior conforms to the constitutive characteristics of the crime of traffic accident)

This confirms the case type is "交通肇事罪" which falls under "危害公共安全罪" (Crimes endangering public safety).

Let me check the final section to complete my review of this document, though I'm confident in the classification.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"4","expected_evidence":"Final confirmation of the case type and conclusion"}</search>
<info anchor_id="4">
综上，原判认定事实和适用法律正确。你的申诉不符合《中华人民共和国刑事诉讼法》第二百五十三条规定的再审条件，本院予以驳回。
特此通知。
</info>

--- Round 5 ---
<think>From all four sections, I have confirmed that this document (DOC3 - 《判决文书3》) is a criminal case involving "交通肇事罪" (crime of causing traffic accidents).

Key evidence:
- Section 1: "你因交通肇事一案" (You, due to a traffic accident case)
- Section 2: "已构成交通肇事罪" (have constituted the crime of traffic accident)
- Section 3: "你的行为符合交通肇事罪的构成特点" (Your behavior conforms to the constitutive characteristics of the crime of traffic accident)

"交通肇事罪" is classified under "危害公共安全罪" (Crimes endangering public safety) in Chinese criminal law.

I have now reviewed all sections of this document and can confidently classify it. I should stop and provide the answer.

The answer should be the document title in the appropriate category. Since this is DOC3 (《判决文书3》), it belongs to "危害公共安全罪".</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"collected all needed evidence"}</search>
<answer>["《判决文书3》"]</answer>
